creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The port lang/swi-pl fails to build with a failing patch error in poudriere. I have attached the poudriere log. The relevant excerpt from the log is below:


===>  Extracting for swi-pl-7.4.2
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for swipl-7.4.2.tar.gz.
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: patch-depends  >============================
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: patch          >============================
===>  Patching for swi-pl-7.4.2
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for swi-pl-7.4.2
2 out of 2 hunks failed--saving rejects to packages/ssl/ssl4pl.c.rej
=> FreeBSD patch patch-packages_ssl_ssl4pl.c failed to apply cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/swi-pl
====>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for swi-pl-7.4.2
build of lang/swi-pl ended at Fri May 12 08:39:34 EDT 2017
build time: 00:00:01
!!! build failure encountered !!!
